title: Right of Assembly and Petition
doc_html:
§9.  Right of Assembly and Petition

Section 9.  No law shall impair the right of any person to assemble peaceably or to petition government for a redress of grievances.
doc_text:
§9.  Right of Assembly and Petition
Section 9.  No law shall impair the right of any person to assemble peaceably or to petition government for a redress of grievances.
